creator: gamer@ryppn.com
text:
Please bump -current version please.

Not entirely sure how to create one of those nice diffs but here's what I have, education required.

diff mail/postfix-current/Makefile /root/workarea/packages/postfix-current-20240902/Makefile
2c2
< DISTVERSION=	3.10-20240612
---
> DISTVERSION=	3.10-20240902

diff mail/postfix-current/distinfo  /root/workarea/packages/postfix-current-20240902/distinfo
2,3c2,3
< SHA256 (postfix/postfix-3.10-20240612.tar.gz) = 2dcea4741f0005251b43f07a06ba96204d27f918949e2b823f67280e924c7039
< SIZE (postfix/postfix-3.10-20240612.tar.gz) = 4958739
---
> SHA256 (postfix/postfix-3.10-20240902.tar.gz) = b78f79e2872b9f1a5953ad74ec61209b36e6f77908661f3bf606dc3ccdf2eb57
> SIZE (postfix/postfix-3.10-20240902.tar.gz) = 4963467
